content: Appointments must be cancelled at least 24 hours in advance to avoid a cancellation fee.
title: Cancellation Policy

content: Gift cards may be used toward services and retail purchases and are non-refundable.
short_summary: Gift cards are non-refundable and valid for services or retail.
title: Gift Card Policy

content: Late arrivals may receive abbreviated service time to avoid impacting the next guest appointment.
short_summary: Late arrivals may shorten treatment time.
title: Late Arrival Policy

content: Prenatal massage is offered after the first trimester. Clients should consult their physician if they have any concerns.
short_summary: Prenatal massage is available after the first trimester.
title: Prenatal Service Policy

content: Guests are encouraged to arrive 15 minutes early for intake, changing, and relaxation before treatment.
title: Arrival Policy
